testcase.name: test_rent_payments_endpoint
testcase.failure: tests/test_2fa_and_pages.py:149: in test_rent_payments_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["query","org_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_rent_payments_summary
testcase.failure: tests/test_2fa_and_pages.py:157: in test_rent_payments_summary assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["query","org_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_reports_types_endpoint
testcase.failure: tests/test_2fa_and_pages.py:170: in test_reports_types_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
